treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 500 cc NS; dosages for vancomycin, zosyn, and ondansetron not specified
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was sleeping but arousable, reported being overwhelmed with recent events but did not remember what brought her to the hospital

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with syncope and hypoxia, emergency medical services called
Patient received treatment in the emergency department including blood pressure stabilization
Patient started on Normal Saline, Vancomycin, Zosyn, and Ondansetron prior to transfer to the floor
Patient transferred to the floor for monitoring
Discussion with family led to a decision against pacemaker placement

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient is to be discharged as family decided to take her home
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was comfortable and in no acute distress upon discharge
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed feeling overwhelmed with recent events and does not remember the hospitalization
